resend_api_key.description: API key from your Resend account (resend.com/api-keys)

from_email.description: Verified sender email in Resend (e.g. alerts@yourdomain.com)

recipient_emails.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to receive alerts

email_subject_prefix.description: Prefix added to alert email subjects

priority_filter.description: Which ticket priorities should trigger email alerts
